//: Template for appsettings.json (which is gitignored — never commit the real one). Copy this to appsettings.json next to the server and fill in the secret values. The server reads config from appsettings.json, then appsettings.{Environment}.json, then environment variables (env wins), then command line (--AdminKey ... wins). So AdminKey can also be supplied via an env var instead of this file.
//AdminKey: REQUIRED. Strong random shared secret guarding every /api/admin/* endpoint (and the strict reset-pin endpoint). Generate e.g. a base64 32-byte value; set the SAME value in the Admin PC app (Settings -> AdminKey). An empty/missing AdminKey leaves the books/branding admin endpoints open and makes reset-pin always return 401.

License.//: IssuerUrl is the license issuer endpoint (overridable here; the server falls back to its built-in default if omitted). SecretHex was removed — it was never read by any code.
